dashboards_data.name: XSIAM SOC Value Driver Metrics
dashboards_data.description: PAN Value Driver metrics mapped to XSIAM data. VD1: Reduce Risk / VD2: Simplify Ops / VD3: Efficiency & Talent / VD4: Secure Growth.

data.phrase:
dataset = cases
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases
| sort desc total_cases
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "RESOLVED" and (xdm.case.status.resolution_comment = "Resolved by the Auto Triage Job" or xdm.case.status.resolution_comment = "Auto-resolved by Cortex XSIAM because all of the alerts contained in this incident are excluded or resolved")
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases
| sort desc total_cases
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW" or xdm.case.status_progress = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases
| sort desc total_cases
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

dataset = alerts
| filter severity = "critical" or severity = "high"
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as critical_alerts by severity
| sort desc critical_alerts
| view graph type = pie subtype = full show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = severity yaxis = critical_alerts

config case_sensitive = false
| dataset = issues
| comp
    min(_time) as t_start,
    max(_time) as t_end,
    count_distinct(xdm.issue.id) as total_issues
| alter days_selected = add(timestamp_diff(t_end, t_start, "DAY"), 1)
| alter issues_per_day = round(divide(total_issues, days_selected))
| alter issues_per_hour = round(divide(issues_per_day, 24))
| alter analyst_required = round(divide(issues_per_hour, 13))
| alter analyst_required = if(analyst_required < 1, 1, analyst_required )
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = analyst_required

config case_sensitive = false
| dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW" or xdm.case.status_progress = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| filter xdm.case.starred = true
| comp
    min(_time) as t_start,
    max(_time) as t_end,
    count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases
| alter days_selected = add(timestamp_diff(t_end, t_start, "DAY"), 1)
| alter incidents_per_day = round(divide(total_cases, days_selected))
| alter incidents_per_hour = round(divide(incidents_per_day, 24))
| alter analyst_required = round(divide(incidents_per_hour, 13))
| alter analyst_required = if(analyst_required < 1, 1, analyst_required )
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = analyst_required

dataset = alerts
| arrayexpand original_tags
| filter original_tags contains "DS:"
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as total_alerts by original_tags
| sort desc total_alerts
| view graph type = column subtype = grouped layout = horizontal header = "Alerts by Data Source" xaxis = original_tags yaxis = total_alerts xaxistitle = "Data Source" yaxistitle = "Alerts" seriestitle("total_alerts","Alerts by Data Source")

dataset = xsiam_playbookmetrics_raw
| alter Tasks = Tasks->[]
| arrayexpand Tasks
| alter
taskState = tasks->state,
taskType = tasks->type,
taskId = tasks->id,
taskName = tasks->name,
scriptID = tasks->scriptId,
incidentID = alert->[0].parentXDRIncident,
alertID = alert->[0].id,
alertName = alert->name,
alertType = alert->type,
playbookId = alert->[0].playbookId
| filter taskType not in ("start", "title", "condition")
| filter scriptID != "" and scriptID != null
| alter dedupkey = concat(incidentID,taskId, alertID)
| dedup dedupkey
| filter taskState = "Completed"
| filter tasktype = "regular"
| alter ScriptID = if ( scriptID ~= "^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89abAB][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$", "Custom", ScriptID )
| join type = inner (dataset = value_tags
| filter Category != "use_case" and Time != "" and Time != null and ScriptID != "" and ScriptID != null
| fields Category as value_category, ScriptID as value_scriptid, `Tag` as value_tag, TaskName as value_taskname, Time as value_time
) as vt (scriptID contains vt.value_scriptid)
| fields value_category, value_scriptid, value_tag, value_taskname, value_time, _time
| alter soc_event_minutes = to_integer(value_time)
| comp sum(soc_event_minutes) as total_soc_minutes
| alter total_soc_hours = round(divide(total_soc_minutes,60))
| view graph type = single subtype = standard header = "Hours Saved by XSIAM" yaxis = total_soc_hours dataunit = "Hours" headcolor = "#f1f7f0" font = "Arial" headerfontsize = 6

dataset = alerts
| comp count_distinct(alert_source) as security_tools
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = security_tools header = "Security Tools Integrated"

dataset = alerts
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as total_alerts by alert_source
| sort desc total_alerts
| view graph type = pie show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = alert_source yaxis = total_alerts

dataset = xsiam_playbookmetrics_raw
| alter Tasks = Tasks->[]
| arrayexpand Tasks
| alter
taskState = tasks->state,
taskType = tasks->type,
taskId = tasks->id,
taskName = tasks->name,
scriptID = tasks->scriptId,
incidentID = alert->[0].parentXDRIncident,
alertID = alert->[0].id,
alertName = alert->name,
alertType = alert->type,
playbookId = alert->[0].playbookId
| filter taskType not in ("start", "title", "condition")
| filter scriptID != "" and scriptID != null
| alter dedupkey = concat(incidentID,taskId, alertID)
| dedup dedupkey
| filter taskState = "Completed"
| filter tasktype = "regular"
| alter ScriptID = if ( scriptID ~= "^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89abAB][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$", "Custom", ScriptID )
| join type = inner (dataset = value_tags
| filter Category != "use_case" and Time != "" and Time != null and ScriptID != "" and ScriptID != null
| fields Category as value_category, ScriptID as value_scriptid, `Tag` as value_tag, TaskName as value_taskname, Time as value_time, Product as value_product, Vendor as value_vendor
) as vt (scriptID contains vt.value_scriptid)
| fields value_category, value_scriptid, value_tag, value_taskname, value_time, _time, value_product, value_vendor
| alter soc_event_minutes = to_integer(value_time)
| comp sum(soc_event_minutes) as total_soc_minutes by value_product, value_vendor
| alter total_soc_hours = round(divide(total_soc_minutes, 60))
| fields value_product, value_vendor, total_soc_minutes, total_soc_hours
| sort desc total_soc_hours
| view graph type = funnel header = "Most Used Vendors" show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = value_vendor yaxis = total_soc_hours

dataset = xsiam_playbookmetrics_raw
| alter Tasks = Tasks->[]
| arrayexpand Tasks
| alter
taskState = tasks->state,
taskType = tasks->type,
taskId = tasks->id,
taskName = tasks->name,
scriptID = tasks->scriptId,
incidentID = alert->[0].parentXDRIncident,
alertID = alert->[0].id,
alertName = alert->name,
alertType = alert->type,
playbookId = alert->[0].playbookId
| filter taskType not in ("start", "title", "condition")
| filter scriptID != "" and scriptID != null
| alter dedupkey = concat(incidentID,taskId, alertID)
| dedup dedupkey
| filter taskState = "Completed"
| filter tasktype = "regular"
| alter ScriptID = if ( scriptID ~= "^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89abAB][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$", "Custom", ScriptID )
| join type = inner (dataset = value_tags
| filter Category != "use_case" and Time != "" and Time != null and ScriptID != "" and ScriptID != null
| fields Category as value_category, ScriptID as value_scriptid, `Tag` as value_tag, TaskName as value_taskname, Time as value_time
) as vt (scriptID contains vt.value_scriptid)
| fields value_category, value_scriptid, value_tag, value_taskname, value_time, _time
| fields value_time, value_category
| alter soc_event_minutes = to_integer(value_time)
| comp sum(soc_event_minutes) as total_soc_minutes by value_category
| alter total_soc_hours = round(divide(total_soc_minutes,60))
| sort desc total_soc_minutes
| view graph type = column subtype = grouped layout = horizontal show_callouts = `true` xaxis = value_category yaxis = total_soc_minutes,total_soc_hours seriescolor("total_soc_minutes","#23ae4f") seriescolor("total_soc_hours","#7cb5ec") xaxistitle = "Category" yaxistitle = "Time" seriestitle("total_soc_minutes","Minutes Saved") seriestitle("total_soc_hours","Hours Saved")

dataset = xsiam_playbookmetrics_raw
| alter Tasks = Tasks->[]
| arrayexpand Tasks
| alter
taskState = tasks->state,
taskType = tasks->type,
taskId = tasks->id,
taskName = tasks->name,
scriptID = tasks->scriptId,
incidentID = alert->[0].parentXDRIncident,
alertID = alert->[0].id,
alertName = alert->name,
alertType = alert->type,
playbookId = alert->playbookId
| filter taskType = "playbook"
| filter taskState = "Completed"
| join type = inner (dataset = value_tags
| filter Category = "use_case"
| fields Category as value_category, ScriptID as value_scriptid, `Tag` as value_tag, TaskName as value_taskname, Time as value_time, PlaybookID as playbook_id
) as vt (taskName = vt.value_taskname)
| fields value_category, value_scriptid, value_tag, value_taskname, value_time, _time, playbook_id
| fields value_time, value_tag, value_category
| alter soc_event_minutes = to_integer(value_time)
| comp sum(soc_event_minutes) as total_soc_minutes by value_tag
| alter total_soc_hours = divide(total_soc_minutes,60)
| sort desc total_soc_hours
| view graph type = column subtype = grouped layout = horizontal header = "Use Case Coverage" xaxis = value_tag yaxis = total_soc_hours xaxistitle = "Use Case" yaxistitle = "Hours"

widgets_data.title: VD1 — Total Cases (Cost-per-Incident Baseline)
widgets_data.description: Total case volume — denominator for cost-per-incident. Baseline for VD1 business case.

data.phrase:
dataset = cases
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases
| sort desc total_cases
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

widgets_data.title: VD1 — Cases Auto-Resolved (Without Human Involvement)
widgets_data.description: % alerts/cases resolved without analyst — key VD1 metric: % resolved without human involvement.

data.phrase:
dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "RESOLVED" and (xdm.case.status.resolution_comment = "Resolved by the Auto Triage Job" or xdm.case.status.resolution_comment = "Auto-resolved by Cortex XSIAM because all of the alerts contained in this incident are excluded or resolved")
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases
| sort desc total_cases
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

widgets_data.title: VD1 — Open Manual Cases (Requiring Analyst)
widgets_data.description: Cases requiring analyst — false positive + dwell time proxy. VD1: drive this down over PoV.

data.phrase:
dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW" or xdm.case.status_progress = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases
| sort desc total_cases
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

widgets_data.title: VD1 — Critical Alerts (Attack Surface Risk)
widgets_data.description: # critical severity alerts — proxy for # critical vulnerabilities in production. VD1 metric.

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| filter severity = "critical" or severity = "high"
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as critical_alerts by severity
| sort desc critical_alerts
| view graph type = pie subtype = full show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = severity yaxis = critical_alerts

widgets_data.title: VD1/VD3 — Analysts Required WITHOUT XSIAM (Before State)
widgets_data.description: Staffing required to handle all issues without XSIAM automation — establishes before state. VD1 MTTR/cost baseline.

data.phrase:
config case_sensitive = false
| dataset = issues
| comp
    min(_time) as t_start,
    max(_time) as t_end,
    count_distinct(xdm.issue.id) as total_issues
| alter days_selected = add(timestamp_diff(t_end, t_start, "DAY"), 1)
| alter issues_per_day = round(divide(total_issues, days_selected))
| alter issues_per_hour = round(divide(issues_per_day, 24))
| alter analyst_required = round(divide(issues_per_hour, 13))
| alter analyst_required = if(analyst_required < 1, 1, analyst_required )
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = analyst_required

widgets_data.title: VD1/VD3 — Analysts Required WITH XSIAM (After State)
widgets_data.description: Staffing required post-XSIAM automation — demonstrates headcount reduction. VD1 MTTR/cost metric.

data.phrase:
config case_sensitive = false
| dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW" or xdm.case.status_progress = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| filter xdm.case.starred = true
| comp
    min(_time) as t_start,
    max(_time) as t_end,
    count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases
| alter days_selected = add(timestamp_diff(t_end, t_start, "DAY"), 1)
| alter incidents_per_day = round(divide(total_cases, days_selected))
| alter incidents_per_hour = round(divide(incidents_per_day, 24))
| alter analyst_required = round(divide(incidents_per_hour, 13))
| alter analyst_required = if(analyst_required < 1, 1, analyst_required )
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = analyst_required

widgets_data.title: VD1 — Alerts by Data Source (Detection Coverage)
widgets_data.description: Alerts per data source — breadth of detection coverage. VD1: proactive security, full visibility.

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| arrayexpand original_tags
| filter original_tags contains "DS:"
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as total_alerts by original_tags
| sort desc total_alerts
| view graph type = column subtype = grouped layout = horizontal header = "Alerts by Data Source" xaxis = original_tags yaxis = total_alerts xaxistitle = "Data Source" yaxistitle = "Alerts" seriestitle("total_alerts","Alerts by Data Source")

widgets_data.title: VD2 — Total Hours Saved by XSIAM (ROCE/ROI Proxy)
widgets_data.description: Total analyst hours automated by XSIAM — primary ROCE/ROI metric for VD2 business case.

data.phrase:
dataset = xsiam_playbookmetrics_raw
| alter Tasks = Tasks->[]
| arrayexpand Tasks
| alter
taskState = tasks->state,
taskType = tasks->type,
taskId = tasks->id,
taskName = tasks->name,
scriptID = tasks->scriptId,
incidentID = alert->[0].parentXDRIncident,
alertID = alert->[0].id,
alertName = alert->name,
alertType = alert->type,
playbookId = alert->[0].playbookId
| filter taskType not in ("start", "title", "condition")
| filter scriptID != "" and scriptID != null
| alter dedupkey = concat(incidentID,taskId, alertID)
| dedup dedupkey
| filter taskState = "Completed"
| filter tasktype = "regular"
| alter ScriptID = if ( scriptID ~= "^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89abAB][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$", "Custom", ScriptID )
| join type = inner (dataset = value_tags
| filter Category != "use_case" and Time != "" and Time != null and ScriptID != "" and ScriptID != null
| fields Category as value_category, ScriptID as value_scriptid, `Tag` as value_tag, TaskName as value_taskname, Time as value_time
) as vt (scriptID contains vt.value_scriptid)
| fields value_category, value_scriptid, value_tag, value_taskname, value_time, _time
| alter soc_event_minutes = to_integer(value_time)
| comp sum(soc_event_minutes) as total_soc_minutes
| alter total_soc_hours = round(divide(total_soc_minutes,60))
| view graph type = single subtype = standard header = "Hours Saved by XSIAM" yaxis = total_soc_hours dataunit = "Hours" headcolor = "#f1f7f0" font = "Arial" headerfontsize = 6

widgets_data.title: VD2 — # Security Tools Integrated (Data Sources)
widgets_data.description: Distinct alert sources ingesting into XSIAM — VD2 metric: # security tools / platform consolidation.

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| comp count_distinct(alert_source) as security_tools
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = security_tools header = "Security Tools Integrated"

widgets_data.title: VD2 — Alert Source Breakdown (Tool Consolidation View)
widgets_data.description: Alerts by source — shows which tools are ingesting. VD2: vendor consolidation narrative.

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as total_alerts by alert_source
| sort desc total_alerts
| view graph type = pie show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = alert_source yaxis = total_alerts

widgets_data.title: VD2 — Vendor Automation Usage (Vendor Spend Proxy)
widgets_data.description: Which vendors XSIAM is automating most — feeds vendor spend + tool consolidation narrative. VD2.

data.phrase:
dataset = xsiam_playbookmetrics_raw
| alter Tasks = Tasks->[]
| arrayexpand Tasks
| alter
taskState = tasks->state,
taskType = tasks->type,
taskId = tasks->id,
taskName = tasks->name,
scriptID = tasks->scriptId,
incidentID = alert->[0].parentXDRIncident,
alertID = alert->[0].id,
alertName = alert->name,
alertType = alert->type,
playbookId = alert->[0].playbookId
| filter taskType not in ("start", "title", "condition")
| filter scriptID != "" and scriptID != null
| alter dedupkey = concat(incidentID,taskId, alertID)
| dedup dedupkey
| filter taskState = "Completed"
| filter tasktype = "regular"
| alter ScriptID = if ( scriptID ~= "^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89abAB][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$", "Custom", ScriptID )
| join type = inner (dataset = value_tags
| filter Category != "use_case" and Time != "" and Time != null and ScriptID != "" and ScriptID != null
| fields Category as value_category, ScriptID as value_scriptid, `Tag` as value_tag, TaskName as value_taskname, Time as value_time, Product as value_product, Vendor as value_vendor
) as vt (scriptID contains vt.value_scriptid)
| fields value_category, value_scriptid, value_tag, value_taskname, value_time, _time, value_product, value_vendor
| alter soc_event_minutes = to_integer(value_time)
| comp sum(soc_event_minutes) as total_soc_minutes by value_product, value_vendor
| alter total_soc_hours = round(divide(total_soc_minutes, 60))
| fields value_product, value_vendor, total_soc_minutes, total_soc_hours
| sort desc total_soc_hours
| view graph type = funnel header = "Most Used Vendors" show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = value_vendor yaxis = total_soc_hours

widgets_data.title: VD2 — Time Saved by Category (% Time on Integrations/Maintenance)
widgets_data.description: Hours saved per automation category — maps to VD2: % time spent on integrations and maintenance.

data.phrase:
dataset = xsiam_playbookmetrics_raw
| alter Tasks = Tasks->[]
| arrayexpand Tasks
| alter
taskState = tasks->state,
taskType = tasks->type,
taskId = tasks->id,
taskName = tasks->name,
scriptID = tasks->scriptId,
incidentID = alert->[0].parentXDRIncident,
alertID = alert->[0].id,
alertName = alert->name,
alertType = alert->type,
playbookId = alert->[0].playbookId
| filter taskType not in ("start", "title", "condition")
| filter scriptID != "" and scriptID != null
| alter dedupkey = concat(incidentID,taskId, alertID)
| dedup dedupkey
| filter taskState = "Completed"
| filter tasktype = "regular"
| alter ScriptID = if ( scriptID ~= "^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89abAB][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$", "Custom", ScriptID )
| join type = inner (dataset = value_tags
| filter Category != "use_case" and Time != "" and Time != null and ScriptID != "" and ScriptID != null
| fields Category as value_category, ScriptID as value_scriptid, `Tag` as value_tag, TaskName as value_taskname, Time as value_time
) as vt (scriptID contains vt.value_scriptid)
| fields value_category, value_scriptid, value_tag, value_taskname, value_time, _time
| fields value_time, value_category
| alter soc_event_minutes = to_integer(value_time)
| comp sum(soc_event_minutes) as total_soc_minutes by value_category
| alter total_soc_hours = round(divide(total_soc_minutes,60))
| sort desc total_soc_minutes
| view graph type = column subtype = grouped layout = horizontal show_callouts = `true` xaxis = value_category yaxis = total_soc_minutes,total_soc_hours seriescolor("total_soc_minutes","#23ae4f") seriescolor("total_soc_hours","#7cb5ec") xaxistitle = "Category" yaxistitle = "Time" seriestitle("total_soc_minutes","Minutes Saved") seriestitle("total_soc_hours","Hours Saved")

widgets_data.title: VD2/VD3 — Use Case Coverage (% Proactive vs Reactive Tasks)
widgets_data.description: Time spent per use case — maps to VD2/VD3: % proactive vs reactive tasks and OOTB automation.

data.phrase:
dataset = xsiam_playbookmetrics_raw
| alter Tasks = Tasks->[]
| arrayexpand Tasks
| alter
taskState = tasks->state,
taskType = tasks->type,
taskId = tasks->id,
taskName = tasks->name,
scriptID = tasks->scriptId,
incidentID = alert->[0].parentXDRIncident,
alertID = alert->[0].id,
alertName = alert->name,
alertType = alert->type,
playbookId = alert->playbookId
| filter taskType = "playbook"
| filter taskState = "Completed"
| join type = inner (dataset = value_tags
| filter Category = "use_case"
| fields Category as value_category, ScriptID as value_scriptid, `Tag` as value_tag, TaskName as value_taskname, Time as value_time, PlaybookID as playbook_id
) as vt (taskName = vt.value_taskname)
| fields value_category, value_scriptid, value_tag, value_taskname, value_time, _time, playbook_id
| fields value_time, value_tag, value_category
| alter soc_event_minutes = to_integer(value_time)
| comp sum(soc_event_minutes) as total_soc_minutes by value_tag
| alter total_soc_hours = divide(total_soc_minutes,60)
| sort desc total_soc_hours
| view graph type = column subtype = grouped layout = horizontal header = "Use Case Coverage" xaxis = value_tag yaxis = total_soc_hours xaxistitle = "Use Case" yaxistitle = "Hours"

widgets_data.title: VD3 — Manual Cases (Manual Alerts #)
widgets_data.description: Open cases requiring analyst attention — VD3 manual alerts (#) metric. Target: drive down over PoV.

data.phrase:
dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW" or xdm.case.status_progress = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases
| sort desc total_cases
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

widgets_data.title: VD3 — High Priority Manual Cases (Starred)
widgets_data.description: Starred open cases — high-impact incidents requiring analyst. VD3: staffing and talent sustainability.

data.phrase:
dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW" or xdm.case.status_progress = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| filter xdm.case.starred = true
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases
| sort desc total_cases
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = total_cases

widgets_data.title: VD3 — Time on Automation by Playbook Task (% Automation)
widgets_data.description: Time saved per automation task — VD3: time spent on automation (playbooks) %. Shows analyst hours freed.

data.phrase:
dataset = xsiam_playbookmetrics_raw
| alter Tasks = Tasks->[]
| arrayexpand Tasks
| alter
taskState = tasks->state,
taskType = tasks->type,
taskId = tasks->id,
taskName = tasks->name,
scriptID = tasks->scriptId,
incidentID = alert->[0].parentXDRIncident,
alertID = alert->[0].id,
alertName = alert->name,
alertType = alert->type,
playbookId = alert->[0].playbookId
| filter taskType not in ("start", "title", "condition")
| filter scriptID != "" and scriptID != null
| alter dedupkey = concat(incidentID,taskId, alertID)
| dedup dedupkey
| filter taskState = "Completed"
| filter tasktype = "regular"
| alter ScriptID = if ( scriptID ~= "^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89abAB][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$", "Custom", ScriptID )
| join type = inner (dataset = value_tags
| filter Category != "use_case" and Time != "" and Time != null and ScriptID != "" and ScriptID != null
| fields Category as value_category, ScriptID as value_scriptid, `Tag` as value_tag, TaskName as value_taskname, Time as value_time
) as vt (scriptID contains vt.value_scriptid)
| fields value_category, value_scriptid, value_tag, value_taskname, value_time, _time
| alter soc_event_minutes = to_integer(value_time)
| comp sum(soc_event_minutes) as total_soc_minutes by value_tag
| alter total_soc_hours = round(divide(total_soc_minutes, 60))
| fields value_tag, total_soc_minutes, total_soc_hours
| sort desc total_soc_minutes
| view graph type = column subtype = grouped layout = horizontal show_callouts = `true` xaxis = value_tag yaxis = total_soc_minutes,total_soc_hours seriescolor("total_soc_hours","#7cb5ec") seriescolor("total_soc_minutes","#23ae4f") xaxistitle = "Task" yaxistitle = "Time" seriestitle("total_soc_minutes","Minutes Saved") seriestitle("total_soc_hours","Hours Saved")

widgets_data.title: VD3 — Analysts Required post-XSIAM (MTTA/MTTC Staffing Metric)
widgets_data.description: Analysts needed to handle remaining manual cases at 13 EPH — VD3 MTTA/MTTC staffing metric.

data.phrase:
config case_sensitive = false
| dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW" or xdm.case.status_progress = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| filter xdm.case.starred = true
| comp
    min(_time) as t_start,
    max(_time) as t_end,
    count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as total_cases
| alter days_selected = add(timestamp_diff(t_end, t_start, "DAY"), 1)
| alter incidents_per_day = round(divide(total_cases, days_selected))
| alter incidents_per_hour = round(divide(incidents_per_day, 24))
| alter analyst_required = round(divide(incidents_per_hour, 13))
| alter analyst_required = if(analyst_required < 1, 1, analyst_required )
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = analyst_required

widgets_data.title: VD4 — Unmitigated Critical Risks (Open Critical Cases)
widgets_data.description: Open critical/starred cases = unmitigated risks on attack surface. VD4: % change in unmitigated critical risks.

data.phrase:
dataset = cases
| filter xdm.case.status_progress = "NEW" or xdm.case.status_progress = "UNDER_INVESTIGATION"
| filter xdm.case.starred = true
| comp count_distinct(xdm.case.id) as open_critical
| view graph type = single subtype = standard yaxis = open_critical header = "Open Critical Cases"

widgets_data.title: VD4 — Critical Alerts by Source (Attack Surface Coverage)
widgets_data.description: Critical alert volume per source — maps attack surface risk across the enterprise. VD4 metric.

data.phrase:
dataset = alerts
| filter severity = "critical" or severity = "high"
| comp count_distinct(alert_id) as alert_count by alert_source
| sort desc alert_count
| view graph type = column subtype = grouped layout = horizontal show_callouts = `true` xaxis = alert_source yaxis = alert_count xaxistitle = "Source" yaxistitle = "Critical + High Alerts" seriestitle("alert_count","Critical + High Alerts")

widgets_data.title: VD4 — OOTB Automation Coverage (CI/CD Security Gate Proxy)
widgets_data.description: Use case automation coverage — maps to VD4: CI/CD security automation coverage %. OOTB = no custom code needed.

data.phrase:
dataset = xsiam_playbookmetrics_raw
| alter Tasks = Tasks->[]
| arrayexpand Tasks
| alter
taskState = tasks->state,
taskType = tasks->type,
taskId = tasks->id,
taskName = tasks->name,
scriptID = tasks->scriptId,
incidentID = alert->[0].parentXDRIncident,
alertID = alert->[0].id,
alertName = alert->name,
alertType = alert->type,
playbookId = alert->playbookId
| filter taskType = "playbook"
| filter taskState = "Completed"
| join type = inner (dataset = value_tags
| filter Category = "use_case"
| fields Category as value_category, ScriptID as value_scriptid, `Tag` as value_tag, TaskName as value_taskname, Time as value_time, PlaybookID as playbook_id
) as vt (taskName = vt.value_taskname)
| fields value_category, value_scriptid, value_tag, value_taskname, value_time, _time, playbook_id
| fields value_time, value_tag, value_category
| alter soc_event_minutes = to_integer(value_time)
| comp sum(soc_event_minutes) as total_soc_minutes by value_tag
| alter total_soc_hours = divide(total_soc_minutes,60)
| sort desc total_soc_hours
| view graph type = pie subtype = full show_callouts = `true` show_callouts_names = `true` xaxis = value_tag yaxis = total_soc_hours
